content: dnd-kit (React-only, 3.1M weekly downloads) offers customizable collision detection but requires React. SortableJS (framework-agnostic, 1.1M weekly downloads, 30.9k stars, actively maintained) provides list/group dragging with swap thresholds; snap-back-on-invalid-drop requires small custom onEnd handler. interact.js (276k weekly downloads, 12.9k stars) has native snapping modifiers but has NOT been updated in ~2 years - effectively unmaintained.
